steps: Go to https://dashboard.mux.com and create an account (or log in)
Set the required permissions (Mux Video: Read + Write for full access)
Copy both the Token ID and Token Secret — the secret is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Token ID:Token Secret (Base64)
credential_fields.description: HTTP Basic auth credentials: base64-encode 'TOKEN_ID:TOKEN_SECRET' and use as the Authorization header value with 'Basic ' prefix

notes: Authentication uses HTTP Basic auth with Token ID as username and Token Secret as password
The Token Secret is shown only once — copy it immediately at creation
Access Tokens are scoped to an Environment (Development/Production)
Separate tokens can be created with read-only or read+write permissions
Free tier available with limited encoding minutes and storage

test_endpoint.description: List video assets to verify credentials
